svg.title: Foldable crease pattern
svg.desc: origamisimulator convention: stroke #ff0000=mountain, #0000ff=valley, #000000=border, #00ff00=cut, #ffff00=facet; line opacity = fold angle (1.0=180deg, 0.5=90deg). Scale: 1 unit = 1 mm. Laser: layer "cut" = cut-through, layer "score" = fold/score. Flat-foldable: no (folds to a 3D shell; 44/55 interior vertices violate the theorems).
